case_title: JULIO E. CORNEJO CRUZ VS. MELVIN N. ESCOBAR CRUZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE/SHERIFF-$40) SERVED AUG-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR CRUZ, MELVIN N.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JULIO E. CORNEJO CRUZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MELVIN N. ESCOBAR CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNEJO CRUZ, JULIO E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR CRUZ, MELVIN N. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: PLANTIFF'S NEW ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORNEJO CRUZ, JULIO E.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,716.00 FILED BY CORNEJO CRUZ, JULIO E. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR CRUZ, MELVIN N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR CRUZ, MELVIN N.
